about.heroTitle: From the Highlands to Your Cup
about.heroDescription: We select beans from the Central Highlands and roast in small batches to keep every aroma fresh and clean.

fresh.title: Fresh Roasting
fresh.description: Roasted in small batches for vibrant aroma and a smooth finish.

natural.title: Natural Process
natural.description: Naturally processed for balanced sweetness and bright notes.

quality.title: Quality Control
quality.description: Careful temperature and timing control for consistent, excellent flavor.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Born from our love for Kon Tum beans, we deliver authentic flavor with no additives and no compromise.

origin.label: Origin
origin.p1: Phan Coffee was born in the highlands of Kon Tum, where ideal altitude, cool weather, and fertile basalt soil create exceptional coffee beans.
origin.p2: We work directly with local farmers to ensure fair sourcing and sustainable cultivation. Every roast batch is monitored carefully for consistent taste.

steps.title: Bean selection
steps.desc: Beans are selected carefully from Kon Tum coffee farms to ensure top-quality raw input.

steps.title: Artisan roasting
steps.desc: Traditional hand-roasting with precise control of heat and time for the best possible flavor.

steps.title: Fresh packaging
steps.desc: Packed right after roasting to preserve aroma. One-way valves keep coffee fresher for longer.

steps.title: Fast delivery
steps.desc: Same-day shipping in Kon Tum and nationwide delivery in 2-3 days for maximum freshness.

items.title: 100% pure
items.desc: No flavoring and no preservatives. Only carefully roasted coffee beans.

items.title: Fair trade
items.desc: Direct collaboration with farmers to support sustainable income for local communities.

items.title: Sustainable
items.desc: Eco-friendly packaging and production processes designed to save energy.

cta.title: Ready for your next cup?
cta.subtitle: Discover our collection of pure roasted coffee.

home.heroSubtitle: Experience the essence of the highlands through hand-selected beans roasted with traditional expertise.

hero.title: Brewing Excellence.
hero.subtitle: Pure roasted coffee from Kon Tum — rich aroma, bold flavor. Experience the source.

hero.title: Highland Heritage.
hero.subtitle: Connecting directly with farmers to bring you the finest sustainably sourced beans.

hero.title: Handpicked Quality.
hero.subtitle: Small-batch roasting ensures every bean reaches its maximum flavor potential.

home.introRoastedSubtitle: 86 Lam Tung, Ia Chim, Kon Tum City, Kon Tum
home.introShippingSubtitle: From Phan Coffee to your doorstep.
home.aboutDescription: We source beans from the Central Highlands and roast in small batches to keep flavors vibrant and clean.
home.reviewsSubtitle: A few honest words from customers who have been enjoying Phan Coffee over the years.

updateNews.title: UPDATE NEWS
updateNews.subtitle: A cup of brewed coffee represents a contribution of up to 1.8 grams of fiber of the recommended.

bestSeller.title: Mang Den Blend
bestSeller.quote: “A perfect harmony between smooth bitterness and rich Highland aromas. An emotional journey in every cup.”
bullets: Origin: Mang Den Mountains, Kon Tum

home.reviews1Content: Amazing aroma and a smooth, comforting taste. It feels like home.
home.reviews2Content: Rich flavor with the perfect roast. Highly recommended.
home.reviews3Content: So fresh and balanced—I can’t go without it.
home.clubCtaSubtitle: Get updates on our latest roasts, special offers, and coffee insights every week.

singleOrigin.title: Single Origin
singleOrigin.desc: Original flavor profiles from distinctive coffee-growing regions.

houseBlends.title: House Blends
houseBlends.desc: Signature blends crafted for the unique Phan Coffee experience.

artisticRoasting.title: The art of roasting
artisticRoasting.desc: At Phan Coffee, roasting is not just technical work - it is an art. We listen to each crack, observe color and aroma shifts, and stop at the perfect moment to preserve every layer of flavor.

temp.title: Optimal temperature
temp.desc: Precise heat control unlocks hidden flavor notes.

slowRoast.title: Slow roast
slowRoast.desc: Longer roasting helps beans develop evenly from core to surface.

handsToHeart.desc: Every bean carries the story of hardworking Kon Tum farmers. They care for each tree with dedication, and we continue that journey with passion in every roast.

roastingProcess.title: Artisan roasting process
roastingProcess.description: At Phan Coffee, each roast is a symphony of time and temperature. We do more than roast coffee; we awaken the deepest flavor layers in every bean.

manualSelect.title: Manual selection
manualSelect.desc: Only ripe cherries with proper size standards enter our process.

pureRoast.title: 100% pure roast
pureRoast.desc: No additives. We keep the natural clean bitterness and sweet finish.

scaPack.title: SCA-standard packaging
scaPack.desc: Packed in one-way valve bags to keep coffee as fresh as possible.

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Your coffee adventure hasn't started yet. Browse our selection and pick a blend!
